Description:
APP-CTRL: The status of the session:
 pass - Application is allowed
 block - Application is blocked (silent)
 reject - Quarantine
 reset - Application is blocked and Reset was sent
Sometimes, there is a block page for blocking

Anomaly: Action

DLP: The status of the session:
 log-only - DLP event is detected , but NOT blocked (similar to monitor action)
 block - Blocked
 exempt - Allowed
 ban - blocked (Not in used since FortiOS 5.0, replaced by blocked)
 ban-sender - blocks all data being sent by an ip or user (Not in used since FortiOS 5.0, replaced by quarantine)
 quarantine-ip - Blocked and band the source ip (Not in used since FortiOS 5.0)
 quarantine-interface - Blocked and band the source interface (Not in used since FortiOS 5.0)

DNS: Security action performed by DNS filter

IPS: Security action performed by IPS:
 detected - Attack is detected , but NOT blocked (similar to monitor)
 dropped - Silent packet blocked
 reset - Blocked and respond with Reset
 reset_client - Blocked and reset sent to the client
 reset_server - Blocked and reset sent to the server
 drop_session - Silent block
 pass_session - Session allowed
 clear_session - Session was removed /closed

SSH: The status of the ssh-channel:
 passthrough - channel is allowed
 blocked - channel is blocked

Virus: The status of the session:
 blocked - Blocked infected file by AV engine
 passthrough - Allowed by AV engine
 monitored - Log, but do NOT block infected file
 analytics - Submitted to Sandbox for analysis

VoIP: Action. Eg. block , allow

WAF: Status of the session. Uses following definition: - Deny = blocked by firewall policy. - Start = session start log (special option to enable logging at start of a session). This means firewall allowed. - All Others = allowed by Firewall Policy and the status indicates how it was closed.

Webfilter: Security action performed by WF:
 blocked - url is blocked by webfilter
 passthrough - url is allowed by webfilter

DLP/Virus/Webfilter: User agent - eg. agent="Mozilla/5.0"

WAF: Agent
ECS Description: Unparsed user_agent string.
